LanguageData.Panaquatic_PanaquaticZone_description: Create a zone where colonists will try to grow aquatic plants. This zone can be placed over both fresh and salty water, unless changed in mod settings.
LanguageData.Panaquatic_SalinityStat_Desc:
Water salinity required for this plant's growth. Plants can be freshwater, saltwater, euryhaline, or only grow in the same terrain as in the wild.

Freshwater plants will grow in this terrain: {0}.

Saltwater plants will grow in this terrain: {1}.

Euryhaline plants will grow in any terrain where freshwater and saltwater plants can.
LanguageData.Panaquatic_SalinityStat_DescWildTagged: This is a wild plant and will only be sown in this terrain:
LanguageData.Panaquatic_MarineAgricultureLabel: Allows to place the zone over ocean tiles
LanguageData.Panaquatic_MarineAgricultureTooltip: On by default. Though, it'll be a good idea to turn this off if you aren't using any mods with saltwater plants.
LanguageData.Panaquatic_IndustrialRunoffTooLabel: Allows to place the zone over polluted tiles
LanguageData.Panaquatic_IndustrialRunoffTooTooltip: Off by default. Excluded for convenience: I'm yet to see a mod with cultivated plants which grow in polluted water. Perhaps I don't play enough mods. Report if you see something fun here, alright?
LanguageData.Panaquatic_WarnPreferenceMismatch: {0} will not be sown throughout the entire zone because of water preference mismatch
